word: H933 - בֹּהַק - bôhaq - bo'-hak - Freckled spot

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּהק

Transliteration: bôhaq

Phonetic: bo'-hak

BDB Definition:

  1. a harmless eruption of the skin, skin spot

Origin: from an unused root meaning to be pale

TWOT entry: 210a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
